mapper.select: SELECT sign_id, user_id, agreement_id, agreement_type, agreement_version, signature_image_url, sign_time, ip_address, device_info, is_valid, create_time FROM user_agreement_sign WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_valid = 1 ORDER BY sign_time DESC

SELECT sign_id, user_id, agreement_id, agreement_type, agreement_version, signature_image_url, sign_time, ip_address, device_info, is_valid, create_time FROM user_agreement_sign WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND agreement_id = #{agreementId} AND is_valid = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT s.sign_id, s.user_id, s.agreement_id, s.agreement_type, s.agreement_version, s.signature_image_url, s.sign_time, s.ip_address, s.device_info, s.is_valid, s.create_time FROM user_agreement_sign s INNER JOIN user_agreement a ON s.agreement_id = a.agreement_id WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND a.agreement_type = #{agreementType} AND a.is_current = 1 AND s.is_valid = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_agreement_sign ( user_id, agreement_id, agreement_type, agreement_version, signature_image_url, sign_time, ip_address, device_info, is_valid, create_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{agreementId}, #{agreementType}, #{agreementVersion}, #{signatureImageUrl}, #{signTime}, #{ipAddress}, #{deviceInfo}, #{isValid}, NOW() )
